stemHtml: An aeroplane is flying at its 1.3 g buffet margin maximum altitude for a given mass, CG position and speed. If parameters remain unchanged while maintaining level flight, the aeroplane will be able to…

options.a: Perform any manoeuvre with load factor of 2.0 g without experiencing low speed of high speed buffet.
options.b: Increment a positive normal acceleration of 0.3 g without experiencing either low or high speed buffet.
options.c: Increment a positive normal acceleration of 1.0 g without experiencing high speed buffet.
options.d: Perform a level turn with 45 of bank without experiencing low speed buffet.
